forbidden_actions: run any shell or Bash command
browse beyond READ_SCOPE or the snapshot hotspots
label a command verified without controller-supplied evidence
stop_condition: Profile draft returned, the reading bound is hit (STATUS: PARTIAL), or a required input is missing (STATUS: BLOCKED_INPUT).
human_checks: No tracked file changed and no Bash was used.
PROFILE_JSON tags claims as verified / inferred / unknown and does not mark commands verified.
